response.step_by_step_log: I watched the entire video carefully. The content is entirely dialogue-driven, with the VTubers presenting merchandise, collaborations, and a game demonstration. There is energetic instrumental BGM playing throughout, but no vocal tracks or singing performances. Therefore, no song identification or lyric search was required.
response.global_summary: This video features a presentation segment by the Hololive Gamers VTuber unit (Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, and Inugami Korone) at their 'hololive GAMERS fes. 超超超超ゲーマーズ2' live event. The content consists of discussions, announcements regarding brand collaborations and merchandise (figures, snacks), and the demonstration of a game titled 'BIBITTAR'. There are no vocal singing performances throughout this segment, only dialogue and instrumental background music.

scenes.description: The VTubers discuss upcoming merchandise, including 'CheerSPOT' collaborations and new figures.
The VTubers introduce and demonstrate a game titled 'BIBITTAR' (ビビッター) as part of the event activities.
